engine.ladder_reasoning: It is a shop the visitor browses — categories, brands, product grids ARE the decision surface; closest fit is 'checking a shop'. But it is really a full storefront, not a one-thing evaluation.

goal.one_action: browse the catalog and buy products (add to cart → checkout)

structure.archetype_note: WooCommerce/Elementor storefront on WordPress; homepage is a catalog storefront (new arrivals, bestsellers, categories, brands), not a landing page.

mapped.observed_as: ร้านสินค้าแม่และเด็กที่คัดสรรนวัตกรรมของใช้แม่และเด็ก
เตรียมให้พร้อมก่อนใช้งาน (manuals, safety, FAQs, e-catalog)

unmapped.observed: New Arrivals / Bestsellers / All Categories product grids
unmapped.why_no_fit: Live shoppable product-card grids with sale prices and Add-to-Cart — the canonical sectionList has no product-catalog/shop-grid section (closest 'features' is descriptive, not transactional)

proposed_new.name: storefront-checkout
proposed_new.evidence: WooCommerce cart + checkout selling one-time physical goods; prices_shown + cart_or_checkout true, Add-to-Cart CTAs

confidence.why: fetch_quality is partial — only 2 of 7 pages crawled, meta description missing; but commerce signals (cart/checkout, prices) are unambiguous.

gap_findings: Full e-commerce storefront is out of ICP (job is browse-and-checkout across many SKUs, not one conversion action) — engines/sections cannot express a shoppable catalog with cart; matches storefront-checkout capability.
No canonical section id exists for a transactional product-grid / catalog-shop block.
